name: Cortex Memory
description: Long-term memory system with semantic, episodic, and procedural memory for AI Agents
author: OpenClaw Community

tools.name: search_memory
tools.description: Search the long-term semantic memory for relevant information about past interactions, projects, preferences, or technical context

query.description: The search query to find relevant memories

tools.name: store_event
tools.description: Store a new episodic event or significant milestone in the memory system

summary.description: A brief summary of the event

entities.description: List of entities involved in the event

outcome.description: The outcome or result of the event

tools.name: query_graph
tools.description: Query the memory graph for relationships involving a specific entity (person, project, technology, etc.)

entity.description: The entity name to query relationships for

tools.name: get_hot_context
tools.description: Get the current hot context including SOUL.md and recent session data

limit.description: Maximum number of recent items to include (default: 20)

tools.name: reflect_memory
tools.description: Trigger the reflection engine to process recent events into long-term semantic knowledge

tools.name: sync_memory
tools.description: Synchronize memory by processing new session data

tools.name: promote_memory
tools.description: Promote frequently accessed memories to core rules

tools.name: delete_memory
tools.description: Delete a specific memory by ID

tools.name: update_memory
tools.description: Update a specific memory's content, type, or weight

tools.name: cleanup_memories
tools.description: Clean up old memories beyond specified days

days_old.description: Delete memories older than this many days (default: 90)

memory_type.description: Only clean up memories of this type

tools.name: diagnostics
tools.description: Run system diagnostics to check configuration and connectivity

apiUrl.description: URL of the Cortex Memory Python API server

autoSync.description: Automatically sync memory on session end
